summary: Iteration 1 architect phase: confirmed no rideglory-api changes are required. Defined ProfileCubit DI scope (ADR-1: @lazySingleton in root MultiBlocProvider) and no profile photo upload v1 (ADR-2). Specified GetMyProfileUseCase + ProfileCubit + initials helper + 5 l10n keys with profile_ prefix. Wrote slim handoffs for backend (no-op), frontend (US-1-4 only), devops (no-op), and qa (full traceability for US-1-1 through US-1-4). Initialized docs/architecture/DIAGRAMS.md with profile fetch sequence diagram.
